title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The video argues that despite US dominance in chips, models, and applications, China holds a structural advantage in AI infrastructure through centralized power grid planning and deployment. The US fragmentation across jurisdictions constrains data center expansion, while China's Eastern Data Western Compute strategy and 25,000+ miles of ultra-high-voltage transmission lines enable rapid scaling at gigawatt scales.
